title: Creating SQL Stored Procedures with User-Defined Functions
scenario: Write a SQL stored procedure that uses a user-defined function (UDF) to perform a data transformation and returns a specific set of columns. The stored procedure should be defined with a parameter and should use a specific algorithm to perform the data transformation. The output should be a single SQL query string, and the judge model will check for correct syntax, UDF usage, and query performance. The query should be under 120 words.
constraints: Should use a specific algorithm for data transformation

evaluationCriteria.description: Check for correct SQL syntax and adherence to database schema.
Check for correct usage of the user-defined function.
Check for optimal query performance and minimize the number of data transformations.
